title: swertia piloglandulosa subsp. piloglandulosa
intro: Swertia piloglandulosa subsp. piloglandulosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae, commonly found in the mountainous regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Swertia piloglandulosa subsp. piloglandulosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Swertia piloglandulosa subsp. piloglandulosa is typically prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
